title: Fragment
content:
آ آ آ آ What being in rank-old nature should earlier have that breath been
آ آ آ آ That hï؟½re pï؟½rsonal tells off these heart-song powerful peals? - 
آ آ آ آ A bush-browed, beetle-brï؟½wed bï؟½llow is it?
آ آ آ آ With a soï؟½th-wï؟½sterly wï؟½nd blï؟½stering, with a tide rolls reels
آ آ آ آ Of crumbling, fore-foundering, thundering all-surfy seas in; seen
آ آ آ آ ï؟½nderneath, their glassy barrel, of a fairy green.
آ آ آ آ 
آ آ آ آ Or a jaunting vaunting vaulting assaulting trumpet telling
meaning:
Exploring the themes of classic, Gerard Manley Hopkins delivers a powerful performance in "Fragment"...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
